description: Beauty close-up with hands framing the face — high-axial soft key creates a butterfly read; the hands acting as below-chin fill make a clamshell read equally credible. Two classical patterns, same key geometry, dispute is shape/fill interpretation.

metadata.review_notes: Photographer-verified Phase 3A curation: single high-axial soft key, hands provide passive below-chin reflection. Whether this is butterfly (single source, ignore hand-fill) or clamshell (key + hand-reflector fill structure) is genuinely a two-sided interpretation. Same key direction; dispute is pattern shape only.
